query: UPDATE clients SET clientKey = CONCAT('client_', id) WHERE clientKey IS NULL OR clientKey = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3G7vsVf2Xrg4bKL.root --database iaCkpopGnAhaAjduGswQQS --execute UPDATE clients SET clientKey = CONCAT('client_', id) WHERE clientKey IS NULL OR clientKey = '';
